query: fluorescent overhead lighting institutional office interior unflattering harsh
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: flat lighting — fluorescent institutional interiors, depressing offices/corridors, depthless cold light

response.objective_caption: A black and white photograph taken from a low angle looking down a long corridor, showing rectangular overhead lights receding in a straight line toward a vanishing point, with dark walls on either side and an indistinct shape at the far end.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A black and white photograph taken from a low angle looking down a long corridor with extreme underexposure that buries the walls and floor in crushed shadows. Rectangular overhead lights recede in a straight line toward a vanishing point, while the overwhelming darkness and absence of visible detail create an atmosphere of dread around an indistinct shape at the far end.
